title: Nothing but Vanilla
description: Enhanced vanilla Minecraft experience with the help of several resource packs and quality of life mods.
body:
### Introduction
This modpack aims to improve the vanilla experience. With the help of resource packs and several quality of life mods your playtime should be more refreshing. Combined with several performance mods NBV helps to ensure good FPS and a stable multiplayer sessions. Additionally, it aims to improve the experience for beginners by adding enchanments descriptions, a brewing guide and lots more. 

Also, the modpack contains the Xaero's Minimap and Worldmap, which one might argue is quite a big change compared to vanilla Minecraft. Both of these mods where configured to a lightwight version (e.g. disabled cave-mode, no teleportation).

Last but not least have fun playing an improved vanilla minecraft experience!
